title: Medic: Pacific War
desc: Become a medic - the true hero of war. Survive the horrors of the battlefield, dodge the bullets, and bring salvation to the wounded. Be their last hope in the chaotic reality of the Pacific Front. Patch, revive, and carry them to change the course of the battle! Be ready to make hard choices!

title: Snacktorio
desc: Snacktorio is a factory-cooking simulator where you must satisfy the appetites of unspeakable horrors... with food! Build and manage sprawling networks of machines & pipes to mass produce delicious meals that can satiate the endless hunger of the beasts that are invading your home. Order Up!

title: The Quiet Things
desc: An auto-biographical, narrative game, based on real diary entries kept as a teenager. The Quiet Things seeks to explore mental health issues with a raw but brave look at childhood abuse and trauma. With a deep focus on storytelling through audio, set foot in Alice’s world and hear her story.

title: Goals
desc: GOALS is a gameplay-first, free-to-play, multiplayer focused and esports ready football game, currently in Alpha. Expect a responsive gameplay experience, designed to actually feel like football. Develop your club, build your squad and prove yourself on the pitch. To be the best, play the best.

title: Find Us Cats
desc: Find Us Cats is a new hidden object game starring our favorite feline friends! Find dozens of cats in each level and aim for a high score in the Planetarium and San Francisco. Don't forget to try out the Painting mode! ️

title: Swan Song
desc: Swan Song is a cozy and emotional puzzle game where music guides your journey. Use notes of different shapes and sizes to program a music box and solve each puzzle. Help the swan reach the exit as you uncover a touching story of family, loss and grief.

title: Ahapika: Heroic Agency
desc: Gather brave heroes and open the most heroic agency in Ancient Greece! Help people, argue with the gods, but remember: a mistake can be fatal.

title: House Flipper Remastered Collection
desc: House Flipper Remastered Collection lets you become a one-person renovation crew. Clean, build, decorate, and sell for profit! Now with better graphics, voice acting, all expansions in one toolbox, and some more heartfelt addition. It’s flipping time!

title: You Know The Drill
desc: You Know The Drill is a relaxing incremental mining game about digging underground to harvest ores. Collect resources, sell them, and upgrade your drill to go even deeper!

title: Comatose
desc: After going through a traumatic experience, Laura finds herself trapped within a looping nightmare inside her comatose brain. Fight monsters as you process your trauma and look for the door that will lead you back into the real world.

title: Shepherd Knight
desc: Shepherd Knight is an adventure game where you must guide your flock of sheep, with your faithful dog by your side, through a world infested with dragons, wolves, and other dangers.

title: Pronoun Palace
desc: Pronoun Palace is a word-spelling roguelike set in a dystopian future where the government has taken your pronouns. Use spells to manipulate letter tiles, catch fish, and abuse amphetamines to defeat the Party and get your pronouns back!

title: River City Saga: Journey to the West
desc: River City Saga: Journey to the West is a roguelike action brawler that reimagines the classic Chinese novel with River City characters, casting Kunio as Sun Wukong and other familiar faces as legendary figures. In the turbulent Tang Dynasty, you embark on a pilgrimage to retrieve Buddhist scriptures, fighting through waves of demons and bosses with intuitive, satisfying combat. Every run features different layouts, enemies, and skills, encouraging repeated playthroughs as you grow stronger with each attempt.

title: A-Train 9 Evolution
desc:
The evolved scenery depicts a new city.

The railroad connects cities and transports people. In connected cities, people gather, and the cities grow even larger… In A-Train 9, you can realistically experience the joy of urban development.

A-Train 9 Evolution is not a mere port of A-Train 9—the user interface and graphics have been completely revamped. Furthermore, the addition of new buildings, including greenery-covered buildings, allows for modern urban vistas.

title: Chicken Coop Invaders
desc: Save the chickens! Help Lucas defend the chickens against a ruthless alien attack in this frantic FPS game with Tower Defense elements! Battle through dozens of levels, make allies, buy and upgrade items!

title: Backrooms: No Escape
desc: A 1–6 player immersive psychological horror experience. Venture through multiple handcrafted liminal Backrooms levels, solve puzzles, explore and survive.

title: Upload Aliens
desc: The rule: DON'T LET THEM TOUCH GROUND! Become the Cyberpunk Knight and launch aliens skyward. Use foes as missiles to trigger chain explosions in infinite aerial combos. Unleash this pixel-art roguelite spectacle with just three buttons: Move, Jump, Dash.

title: Sonki's Lagoon
desc: Dive into Sonki's Lagoon, a colorful low-poly high speed 3D platformer, inspired by the classic. Explore a fun world, pull off stylish moves and find all the Johnnies in this indie adventure!

title: Project Microchip
desc: A social deduction survival game set in a radiation-filled, abandoned forest. Survivors must complete tasks to stay alive, while the Infected hunt them down.

title: Crazy Chain: Elpis no Kusari
desc:
To quit being a saint, she falls in love.
"No. I’ll accomplish both love and the salvation of the nation."

Long ago, a war begun by two European nations.
A conflict waged through ever-advancing mysticism and technology continues even now—nearly a thousand years have passed.

title: The 7th Guest Remake
desc: The iconic game The 7th Guest has been brought back to life with modern technology, delivering an atmospheric story like no other. Explore a foreboding mansion, solve mind-bending puzzles, and uncover its dark secrets. The 7th Guest is the ultimate mystery adventure, reimagined for modern platforms.

title: Korean Drone Flying Tour Anmyeon-eup
desc: This game is a drone simulation game that allows you to experience real drone flight based on footage shot by a real flying drone. There is no up, down, left or right direction control, only the control to increase or decrease the drone speed.

title: Pro Cycling Manager 26
desc: Dive into the heart of cycling management with an ever more realistic simulation. From recruitment and staff, to season planning and race strategy, make every decision and lead your team to victory in the sport’s biggest competitions.

title: Tour de France 2026
desc: Take on the best international cyclists with one goal in mind: winning the 2026 Tour de France. Conquer legendary mountain passes, launch your sprints at the perfect moment and emerge triumphant on the Champs-Élysées wearing the Yellow Jersey.

title: There's Nothing Down There
desc: There's Nothing Down There is a short undersea horror exploration game. Descend into a sinkhole at the bottom of the ocean and discover the remains of a lost, yet not dead, civilization.

title: Police Simulator: Patrol Officers - Complete Edition
desc: No description available

title: Factory
desc: A short visual novel about an endless shift at a garment factory. Wonder what gets you liquidated faster: corruption, naivety, or immorality? Industrial melancholy, where nothing goes unpunished.

title: Golem Lights
desc: Light the Path, Awaken the Golems

title: Animal Puzzles
desc: Play and learn who lives in farmlands, forests and seas!

title: Crayon Magic World
desc: Mystical friends met in dreams awaken in vibrant colors at my fingertips!

title: Crystalase
desc: Turn crystals into masterpieces.

title: Fish In
desc: Cast your line across stunning worlds. Catch rare fish, upgrade your gear, and build the ultimate collection. Your fishing adventure awaits!

title: Defi's Devotion
desc:
Enter into a dark and ominous world has the form hand of an inspiring lich. The last step of your ritual is to claim your power and become immortal. With various powers at your disposal and more to claim, you will infect the living, corrupt their structures, and bring ruin to their world.
The folks of this land are guarded by a powerful Overseer who uses the simulated economy's output to summon heroes and protect the people. You must keep your phylactery safe while you feed it corpses and the very buildings they call home. Turn villagers to zombies, take direct control of them, and

title: Hidden Oddities in Everyday Life Mystery
desc:
Wait — something's off here, isn't it?
Spot the oddity hidden in everyday life.

title: Sora: Songs of the Stone
desc: Stay united with your wandering parrot flock.

title: Brain Training! Order Quiz
desc: 365, V = IR, A K Q J… What's the word? Read the clue. Rearrange the letters!

title: Eggconsole Marchen Veil II PC-9801
desc: The saga of the Lake Prince reaches its grand finale. A masterpiece Action RPG that masterfully fuses immersive visuals with pulse-pounding action!

title: Mosaic Quiz Fastest Finger Battle
desc:
What's hiding behind the mosaic?
The moment you see it is the moment you win.

title: Illusion Connect: Re
desc: Illusion Connect: Re is a stylish anime strategy RPG.

title: Roomrush Racer
desc: Race through 20 chaotic rooms with 27 characters in a fast-paced arcade racer. Play solo or with up to 4 players in local split-screen, collect items, master speed classes, and win cups together.

title: 1000 Questions to Be Chosen by the Cat Lord
desc: No description available
